\# Copilot Instructions — Atikul Islam Rabbi Portfolio Website



\## Project Mission



Rebuild this repository as a premium, production-ready static portfolio website for:



\*\*Atikul Islam Rabbi\*\*  

\*\*Role:\*\* Social Media Security Specialist



The final website must be simple to maintain, easy to edit manually, fast, SEO-friendly, and fully compatible with GitHub Pages.



\---



\# Technology Rules



Use only:



\- HTML5

\- CSS3

\- Vanilla JavaScript



Do NOT use:



\- Next.js

\- React

\- Node.js

\- npm

\- pnpm

\- TypeScript

\- Any frontend framework

\- Any build process



The website must work by directly opening HTML files in a browser.



\---



\# Website Structure



Create and maintain this structure:

/

├── index.html

├── about.html

├── services.html

├── portfolio.html

├── contact.html

│

├── assets/

│ ├── css/

│ │ └── style.css

│ │

│ ├── js/

│ │ └── script.js

│ │

│ └── images/

│

└── README.md



Keep the structure clean and beginner-friendly.



\---



\# Design Direction



Create a premium personal brand website.



Style:



\- Dark luxury theme

\- Apple-inspired minimal design

\- Modern glassmorphism

\- Professional cybersecurity aesthetic

\- Smooth animations

\- High-quality spacing

\- Clean typography



Avoid:



\- Generic templates

\- Overloaded designs

\- Excessive colors

\- Flashy effects



The website should feel like a premium technology consultant's personal brand.



\---



\# Brand Identity



Name:



Atikul Islam Rabbi



Professional Title:



Social Media Security Specialist



Main Focus:



Helping individuals, creators, and businesses protect and manage their digital presence.



Brand keywords:



\- Security

\- Trust

\- Privacy

\- Recovery

\- Digital Protection

\- Professional Consultation



\---



\# Required Pages



\## Homepage (index.html)



Include:



\- Hero section

\- Professional introduction

\- Main services overview

\- Trust indicators

\- Featured projects

\- Call-to-action section

\- Footer



Hero example:



"Protecting Digital Identities. Securing Online Presence."



Include buttons:



\- View Services

\- Contact Me



\---



\## About Page



Include:



\- Personal introduction

\- Professional journey

\- Skills

\- Experience

\- Mission and values



Keep the tone professional and trustworthy.



\---



\## Services Page



Create service cards for:



\- Social Media Security Consultation

\- Account Recovery Guidance

\- Business Page Protection

\- Digital Security Strategy

\- Platform Issue Consultation

\- Online Brand Protection



Do not make unrealistic promises or guarantee recovery.



\---



\## Portfolio Page



Create professional case study sections.



Each case study should contain:



\- Project title

\- Challenge

\- Approach

\- Outcome



Respect privacy.



Do not expose confidential client information.



\---



\## Contact Page



Include:



\- Contact information section

\- Social media links

\- Professional inquiry form layout

\- Call-to-action



\---



\# SEO Requirements



Every page must include:



\- Proper title tag

\- Meta description

\- Open Graph tags

\- Twitter card tags

\- Semantic HTML



Use:



\- h1 only once per page

\- Proper heading hierarchy

\- Descriptive image alt text



Add structured data where possible:



\- Person schema

\- Professional service schema

\- Website schema



\---



\# Responsive Design



The website must work perfectly on:



\- Mobile phones

\- Tablets

\- Desktop screens



Use:



\- Flexible layouts

\- CSS media queries

\- Mobile navigation



\---



\# CSS Requirements



Create reusable CSS components:



\- Container

\- Buttons

\- Cards

\- Sections

\- Navigation

\- Footer

\- Hero



Use CSS variables for:



\- Colors

\- Spacing

\- Typography



Keep CSS organized and readable.



\---



\# JavaScript Requirements



Use JavaScript only when necessary.



Allowed:



\- Mobile menu

\- Smooth scrolling

\- Small animations

\- Interactive elements



Avoid unnecessary scripts.



\---



\# Performance Rules



Optimize for:



\- Fast loading

\- Lightweight files

\- No external dependencies

\- No unnecessary libraries



Images should be optimized.



\---



\# GitHub Pages Compatibility



The website must deploy directly from GitHub Pages.



Do not require:



\- Build commands

\- Package installation

\- Server configuration



The final deployment should work by serving:



index.html



\---



\# Code Quality



Write clean professional code.



Requirements:



\- Proper indentation

\- Meaningful class names

\- Comments where useful

\- Easy editing for beginners



Do not create unnecessary files.



\---



\# Final Goal



The final result should look like a premium personal security consultant website that could represent Atikul Islam Rabbi professionally to worldwide clients.



Prioritize:



1\. Design quality

2\. Clear content

3\. Performance

4\. SEO

5\. Easy maintenance
